name: What do I do first if I think my skin rash is from chemicals at my West Valley City job?

mainEntity.name: What do I do first if I think my skin rash is from chemicals at my West Valley City job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer in writing, see doctor for causation proof, file with Labor Commission now.[1][6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Immediately notify your employer in writing and seek medical care linking rash to work exposure.[1] File a formal claim with Utah Labor Commission for evaluation.[6] Key factors: (1) Chemical dermatitis is recognized occupational illness; (2) Presumption if on premises; (3) Covers medical bills, lost wages.[1][6] Document everything, avoid signing insurer statements without advice; attorney can help navigate.[1] Act within deadlines to secure benefits.

description: Notify employer in writing, see doctor for causation proof, file with Labor Commission now.[1][6]
